title: Combat Outcome Telemetry
description: Observational, ADMIN/OFFLINE-only direct-fire adjudication records produced by Engine.enable_outcome_log / drain_outcome_log (PyO3: same names). For balance analysis (A2): the records are NEVER read back into the simulation, so telemetry cannot affect determinism (硬规则 #1). Each record carries no side/unit/position — only the result-table, weapon, effective attack level, target armour class, distance, and outcome of a fire that already occurred — so it cannot leak the location of un-observed units (硬规则 #5). tools/balance_report.py consumes a JSON-array of these; runs/outcomes.jsonl stores one record per line.

table.description: Result-table id this adjudication corresponds to (analysis correspondence to the prob providers).

weapon.description: Firing weapon id (matches config weapon names, e.g. 大号直瞄炮 / 速射炮 / 步兵轻武器).

attackLevel.description: Effective attack level AFTER pre-draw corrections (高差/车数), as the result table saw it.

armor.description: Target armour class label; 'none' for personnel (no armour class).
